=== types.gen.go ===
// Code generated by openapi-sdkgen. DO NOT EDIT.

package generated

import "context"

type User struct {
	ID string `json:"id"`
	Name string `json:"name"`
	Manager *User `json:"manager,omitempty"`
	Roles []string `json:"roles,omitempty"`
}

type CreateUserInput struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
	ManagerID string `json:"managerId,omitempty"`
	Role string `json:"role,omitempty"`
}

type ErrorModel struct {
	Message string `json:"message"`
	Code float64 `json:"code,omitempty"`
}

type HttpMethod string

const (
	MethodGet HttpMethod = "GET"
	MethodPost HttpMethod = "POST"
	MethodPut HttpMethod = "PUT"
	MethodPatch HttpMethod = "PATCH"
	MethodDelete HttpMethod = "DELETE"
	MethodHead HttpMethod = "HEAD"
	MethodOptions HttpMethod = "OPTIONS"
)

type EndpointMetadata struct {
	OperationID string
	Method      HttpMethod
	Path        string
}

// Fetch one user
type GetUserParams struct {
	ID string `json:"id"`
	IncludeDetails bool `json:"includeDetails,omitempty"`
}

// Response body for getUser 200
type GetUserResponse200 User

// Response body for getUser 404
type GetUserResponse404 ErrorModel

type GetUserResponse struct {
	StatusCode int
	Data any
	HTTP200 *GetUserResponse200
	HTTP404 *GetUserResponse404
}

type GetUserOperation struct {
	Method HttpMethod
	Path string
	Params GetUserParams
	Response *GetUserResponse
}

var GetUserMetadata = EndpointMetadata{
	OperationID: "getUser",
	Method: MethodGet,
	Path: "/users/{id}",
}

// Create one user
type CreateUserParams struct{}

// Request body for createUser
type CreateUserRequestBody CreateUserInput

// Response body for createUser 201
type CreateUserResponse201 User

// Response body for createUser 400
type CreateUserResponse400 ErrorModel

type CreateUserResponse struct {
	StatusCode int
	Data any
	HTTP201 *CreateUserResponse201
	HTTP400 *CreateUserResponse400
}

type CreateUserOperation struct {
	Method HttpMethod
	Path string
	Params CreateUserParams
	RequestBody *CreateUserRequestBody
	Response *CreateUserResponse
}

var CreateUserMetadata = EndpointMetadata{
	OperationID: "createUser",
	Method: MethodPost,
	Path: "/users",
}

type Client interface {
	GetUser(ctx context.Context, params GetUserParams) (*GetUserResponse, error)
	CreateUser(ctx context.Context, params CreateUserParams, body CreateUserRequestBody) (*CreateUserResponse, error)
}
